## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes, output is clean
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`, `bun run lint`, and `bun run format:check` are all green
- [ ] New behavior has a test (TDD)
- [ ] Comments and docs state facts directly, with no pointers to scratch or planning notes
- [ ] (Pack PRs) `pack:lint` exits 0; `README.md` + themed statusline shot regenerated (
      `bun run pack:readme`); figure sourced and attributed, or clearly marked pending
- [ ] Follows the guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
